alertMessage: 5/7 Norse agents unreachable due to sandbox policy - cannot spawn unsandboxed subagents from sandboxed cron session
recommendations: Option 1: Configure Tyr, Sindri, Njord, Mimir, and Brokkr as sandboxed agents
Option 2: Run Heimdall health check from an unsandboxed session
Option 3: Add sandbox exemption for Heimdall cron job
